title: Introduction to File Handling Quiz
description: Test your fundamental knowledge about file handling in Node.js and Express.js.

questions.question: Which Node.js module is used most frequently for file system operations?
Why should you avoid synchronous functions like 'fs.readFileSync()' in an Express app?
options: Because they are slower than standard functions.
Because they block the single-threaded Node.js event loop, preventing other requests from being handled.
Because they are not supported in production.
Because they only work in local development.

questions.question: What's the main benefit of using 'Streams' instead of 'Buffers' for large files?
options: To store more data on a single machine.
To read or write data chunk by chunk, preventing memory exhaustion.
To make the application more secure.

questions.question: Which HTML form data encoding is required to upload files to a server?
What's a common initial step for any file handling process when a server receives an incoming request?
options: Parse the binary file data using specialized middleware.
